footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vật tư %s1 và lô %s2 đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục lô.' else N'The record consisting of item %s1 and lot %s2 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vật tư %s1 và lô %s2 đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the record consisting of the item %s1 and lot %s2. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vật tư %s1 và lô %s2 đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the record consisting of the item %s1 and lot %s2. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã vật tư %s1 và lô %s2 đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record consisting of item %s1 and lot %s2 has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where (ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo) or (ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo like rtrim(@ma_lo) + '%') or (ma_vt = @ma_vt and rtrim(@ma_lo) like rtrim(ma_lo) + '%')) begin select 'ma_lo' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_vt)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_lo)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue) begin select 'ma_lo' as field, replace(replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s1', rtrim($ma_vt.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_lo.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_vt <> $ma_vt.OldValue or @ma_lo <> $ma_lo.OldValue begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where (not (ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue)) and ((ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo) or (ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo like rtrim(@ma_lo) + '%') or (ma_vt = @ma_vt and rtrim(@ma_lo) like rtrim(ma_lo) + '%'))) begin select 'ma_lo' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_vt)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_lo)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from ct70 where ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vt' as field, replace(replace(@$updateConflict, '%s1', rtrim($ma_vt.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_lo.OldValue)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from ct90 where ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vt' as field, replace(replace(@$updateConflict, '%s1', rtrim($ma_vt.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_lo.OldValue)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdlo where ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vt' as field, replace(replace(@$updateConflict, '%s1', rtrim($ma_vt.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_lo.OldValue)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdlo2 where ma_vt = $ma_vt.OldValue and ma_lo = $ma_lo.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vt' as field, replace(replace(@$updateConflict, '%s1', rtrim($ma_vt.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_lo.OldValue)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo

if exists(select 1 from ct70 where ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo) begin select replace(replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_vt)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_lo)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from ct90 where ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo) begin select replace(replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_vt)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_lo)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdlo where ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo) begin select replace(replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_vt)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_lo)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdlo2 where ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo) begin select replace(replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_vt)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_lo)) as message return end

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt and kieu_lo = 1) begin select ltrim(rtrim(str(so_ngay_sp, 5))) c1, ltrim(rtrim(str(so_ngay_bh, 5))) as c2 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt return end
